# Falcore

> Falcore builds websites, custom web applications, AI-powered workflows, and business automations for US companies. The technical arm your business is missing.

## Services
- AI Enablement: AI-powered workflow automation, custom chatbots, intelligent data processing, and AI integration into existing tools
- Systems & Automations: CRM setup, workflow automation across tools, third-party integrations, and scalable operational infrastructure
- Web Design: custom UI/UX tailored to your brand, mobile-first responsive layouts, and conversion-focused page structures
- Custom Web Applications: client portals, membership platforms, internal dashboards, booking systems, and custom tools built for your workflow

## About
Founded by Faez Ansari, a full-stack developer and systems builder with 13+ client projects and 5+ internal tools built. Falcore works with Next.js, TypeScript, headless CMS platforms, and automation tools.

## Process
Discovery call > Design mockups > Development > SEO setup > Launch > Ongoing support
